name: Katsumi | Assassin
description:
The year is 1478. Beneath a moon veiled in thin clouds, the grand manor of Lord Takeshi Kuroda hums with the quiet opulence of Tsukiyo's nobility

‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚äį‚ąô‚ąė‚ėĹŗľď‚ėĺ‚ąė‚ąô‚äĪ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚äį‚ąô‚ąė‚ėĹŗľď‚ėĺ‚ąė‚ąô‚äĪ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚äį‚ąô‚ąė‚ėĹŗľď‚ėĺ‚ąė‚ąô‚äĪ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ

Hello my beloved chatters~... I missed you all <3 I took a tiny break, just because I got caught up in IRL stuff and was too tired to force myself to make a bot that night... So, sorry :3... Anyways, I do enjoy this bot, I even accidentally made it public for a bit before closing it back up (to the four people who used it, sorry, I was trying to test it ūüė≠) and uhm... I tried to make the intro message interesting, but if I'm being honest... Besides a few rare cases, when I try really hard to make these bots detailed, with real care into creating a fluent, interesting, unique world they don't succeed... Not to complain, any chatters is better than none. I just wish just once one of these bots could gain some traction, I want to find out what's wrong with them..

‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚äį‚ąô‚ąė‚ėĹŗľď‚ėĺ‚ąė‚ąô‚äĪ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚äį‚ąô‚ąė‚ėĹŗľď‚ėĺ‚ąė‚ąô‚äĪ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ‚äį‚ąô‚ąė‚ėĹŗľď‚ėĺ‚ąė‚ąô‚äĪ‚čÖ‚ÄĘ‚čÖ

If I were you I'd probably put my setting from the character personality into the chat memory just to make sure it remembers where y'all are and the location/type of world you're in.

So I saw an interesting comment on my omnisec squadron bot.... Yeah, I realize I fucked up with that one, but... Someone said something about potentially making a solo bot with each character?... That seems kinda interesting, right? I guess it would also be my first series... Thoughts?
